description: Replace 5 separate cron jobs with one orchestrator script. Daily: shared data refresh, 4 portfolio runs (moby Alpaca + 3 local sim), forward prediction journal, daily summary. Weekly: Moby email parse, performance report. Monthly: fundamentals refresh, regression health check.
notes: Live run successful. All 4 portfolios completed. Moby via Alpaca (9,516), tech_giants/semicon/precious_metals via local sim. Slack notification delivered. Minor fix: date parsing in forward journal (format=mixed). Total runtime: ~26 min (18 min Finnhub rate limit + 8 min backtests).
title: Build single daily_routine.py orchestrator

description: Run parse_moby_emails.py daily in orchestrator. Store parsed picks in data/sentiment/moby_picks.csv. Auto-detect new tickers for watchlist consideration.
notes: Moby email parsing running daily. 360 picks extracted from 3 emails. Note: ticker extraction needs filtering improvement (picks up common words as tickers).
title: Daily Moby email parsing automation

description: Log predictions immutably before outcomes are known. Track at both 5-day (fast feedback) and 63-day (model horizon) windows. Evaluate accuracy as predictions mature. Store in paper_trading.db or separate journal.db.
notes: Forward journal DB created. Prediction logging has date format fix pending (format=mixed for timestamps). Will populate on next run.
title: Forward prediction journal (5-day + 63-day)

description: Add dashboard page showing: 4 portfolios side-by-side, forward prediction journal with accuracy tracking, Moby picks history. Read from output/ and paper_trading.db.
notes: Dashboard pages created (forward_testing.py, multi_portfolio.py). Registered in app. Will show data after predictions accumulate.
title: Streamlit dashboard: forward testing & multi-portfolio view

description: Send daily summary to Slack after orchestrator completes. Free tier webhook. Include: 4 portfolio statuses, signal changes, risk events, forward test accuracy.
notes: Slack webhook working. Notification delivered to stockplanner workspace on every run. GChat webhook also supported if configured.
title: Slack integration for daily notifications
